---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What learning or authoring flow is currently painful? Please describe the concrete scenario.

## Proposed change

What capability, change, or integration would fix it?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Fit with the plan

Which active plan does this slot into? See `plans/`.

- [ ] `plans/learning-system.md`
- [ ] `plans/resilience.md`
- [ ] Proposed new plan (explain below)

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, prior art, related issues.
